explanations.2: The @ symbol silences the output of this command, and \e[1;033m are special codes that make the text yellow and bold in the terminal.
explanations.4: The --link flag connects this container to another service, and --network puts it on a specific Docker network so containers can talk to each other.
explanations.5: The leading dash means "ignore if this command fails"; sensible-browser tries to open a URL in your default browser, and the & at the end runs it in the background.
explanations.28: The leading dash means "don't error out if the browser-opening command fails"; the & at the end runs it in the background so the Makefile continues.
explanations.36: The --link flag connects this container to the joomladb service, and --network ensures it can communicate with other containers in the same Docker network.
